config.title: config
config.description: Flow configuration containing deployment_name and execution parameters

environment.title: environment
environment.description: Environment name for flow run naming

FlowConfig.title: FlowConfig

dry_run.title: Dry Run
dry_run.description: Enable dry run mode (Ansible check mode)

git_ref.title: Git Ref
git_ref.description: Git ref to checkout: commit SHA, short SHA, branch name, or tag. Required -- flow fails if not provided.

ansible_tags.title: Ansible Tags
ansible_tags.description: Comma-separated Ansible tags to limit which roles/tasks run (e.g., 'firewall,observability')

ansible_limit.title: Ansible Limit
ansible_limit.description: Ansible --limit pattern to target specific hosts (e.g., 'janus-1.REDACTEDium.co')

playbook_name.title: Playbook Name
playbook_name.description: Override playbook file name (defaults to deploy_{deployment_name} if empty)

vault_secrets.title: Vault Secrets
vault_secrets.description: List of Vault secrets to fetch and export as env vars. Each entry: {path: 'kv/...', field: 'FIELD', env_var: 'ENV_VAR'}

inventory_name.title: Inventory Name
inventory_name.description: Override inventory file name (defaults to deployment_name if empty)

deployment_name.title: Deployment Name
deployment_name.description: Deployment name (must match playbook, inventory, and secrets conventions)

FlowConfig.description:
Configuration model for the ansible_deploy flow.

Must never contain secrets — only execution parameters.
Secrets live in SecretsContext and are never logged.
